name: Lexicographer Review ALL_NEW
short_description: Generated per-instance selection package with context, WordNet senses, Maru2022 source labels, and model-panel predictions for all 4,917 ALL_NEW (Maru 2022) instances, with S1-S6 waterfall suspicion classification for human re-adjudication.
size_description: 4,917 instances (SE2 + SE3 + SE13 + SE15 polysemous content words) with 10 model predictions each, structured context windows, and complete WordNet sense inventories

files.description: Main dataset: 4,917 records in gzip-compressed JSONL format, one JSON object per ALL_NEW instance
JSON Schema (draft-07) describing the structure of each record in lexicographer_review.jsonl.gz
Summary statistics: total records, S1-S6 bucket counts, model coverage statistics
